data.name: StoreNameAlreadyExistsMessage
data.value: A store with that name already exists

data.name: SendResetPasswordSuccessMessage
data.value: A password reset link sent to your e-mail address. Please check your emails.

data.name: CashRegister_EmptyMsg
data.value: The newly created register is not opened yet. The last closure summary of this register is not available to display.

data.name: IncreaseRefundProductQuantityValidationMessage
data.value: Please enter a valid quantity - It should be less then 0.

data.name: RefundProductQuantityGreaterValidationMessage
data.value: Please enter a valid quantity - It should be less then actual quatity.

data.name: DecreaseSaleProductQuantityValidationMessage
data.value: Please enter a valid quantity - It should be more then 0.

data.name: TyroTerminalConfigurationRequired
data.value: Tyro terminal is not configured! Please configure tyro terminal from payment settings

data.name: MintConfigurationRequired
data.value: Mint is not configured! Please configure mint from payment settings

data.name: AmountValidationForIntegratedPaymentTypeMessage
data.value: The amount entered as ‘tendered’ is more than Pay amount

data.name: HowDidYouHearAboutUs
data.value: How did you hear about us?

data.name: AddGiftCard_Title
data.value: Sell or check gift card balance

data.name: NoInternetMessage
data.value: Internet is not available! Please check your device settings

data.name: GiftCardAmountValidationMessage
data.value: Please enter a valid gift card amount - only numbers, no currency symbols.

data.name: GiftCardNotAvailableValidationMessage
data.value: Sorry, we did not find gift card.

data.name: GiftCardNumberValidationMessage
data.value: Please enter a valid gift card number (max thirty digits and 2 decimal)

data.name: GiftCardNumberMinimumValidationMessage
data.value: Gift card number must be at least 4 characters.

data.name: GiftCardBalanceValidationMessage
data.value: The amount entered as ‘tendered’ is more than the available gift card balance of

data.name: CustomSaleNameValidationMessage
data.value: Please enter this custom product name.

data.name: NoItemBarcodeMessage
data.value: Cannot find a product matching this barcode.

data.name: NoInvoiceItemBarcodeMessage
data.value: Cannot find a sale matching this barcode.

data.name: ExtraProductSelectionValidationMessage
data.value: None selected from the list. Please click on ‘close’ icon if you wish to proceed with no selection.

data.name: OutofStockMessage
data.value: This item is currently out of stock.

data.name: CompositeOutofStockMessage
data.value: One or more items used to create this composite product are out of stock. Please restock following items to continue selling this composite product.

data.name: BackOrderCutomerValidation
data.value: Please assign customer to create Backorder.

data.name: PayButtonCutomerValidation
data.value: Please add customer to the sale for backordered items.

data.name: NoItemInStockMessage
data.value: There isn’t enough stock to finalize this backorder.

data.name: RefundInternetValidationMessage
data.value: Please connect to internet to finalize a refund transaction.

data.name: RefundSyncValidationMessage
data.value: Please connect to internet to finalize a refund transaction.

data.name: RemovePaymentInCloseRegisterAlertMessage
data.value: Please open register to remove payment.

data.name: EnterSaleNoPermissionMessage
data.value: Sorry, You do not have the required access permission.

data.name: CreditBalanceValidationMessage
data.value: The amount is more than the available credit balance.

data.name: CreditLimitValidationMessage
data.value: Payment amount exceeds On Account credit limit.

data.name: LoyaltyLimitValidationMessage
data.value: The payment amount is more than the available loyalty balance.

data.name: iZettleRefundMessage
data.value: This refund cannot be processed using PayPal Zettle!

data.name: PaypalLoginMessage
data.value: Please login to PayPal and try again!

data.name: PaypalRefundMessage
data.value: This refund transaction cannot be processed using PayPal

data.name: MintRefundMessage
data.value: This refund transaction cannot be processed using Mint

data.name: NoFoundVariantProduct
data.value: Sorry, we did not find variant product.

data.name: RemoveCreditPaymentMessage
data.value: Sorry, You can not remove credit payment.

data.name: CloseRegisterLoadDataErrorMessage
data.value: It looks like the register is already closed. Please sync data and try again.

data.name: AlreadyOpenRegisterErrorMessage
data.value: It looks like the register is already opened.

data.name: EmailFailed
data.value: Email failed. Please check the email id and try again.

data.name: DataSyncSuccess
data.value: Data successfully sync’d with your store cloud.

data.name: ExpireMessage
data.value: Sorry, looks like your subscription is expired.

data.name: SubscriptionExntendedMessage
data.value: Your Hike subscripiton renewal failed. Please update credit card details to avoid interruption.

data.name: SubscriptionIsOnHoldMessage
data.value: You've currently paused your Hike subscripiton.

data.name: DataSyncContinueMessage
data.value: You have some unsync data in your store. Do you want to continue with sync?

data.name: RemovePaymentAleartMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this payment?

data.name: ResetAleartMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to change outlet/register?

data.name: LoadUpdateDataText
data.value: Click to manually sync with your store cloud

data.name: MarkPaidOrderOptionDescriptionText
data.value: Deactive this option if you require to park orders for fulfillment after receiving payment and then manually change status to fulfilled.

data.name: AutoLockOptionDescriptionText
data.value: POS screen will auto-lock if idle for the duration set here. Use your 4-digit pin to unlock.

data.name: SyncDataOptionLabelText
data.value: Sync local data with your store cloud

data.name: SyncDataOptionDescriptionText
data.value: Use manual sync if recent edit/updates (e.g.: product changes) are not yet appearing on your sale screen.

data.name: ClearSyncDataOptionLabelText
data.value: Reset/Refresh POS storage on this device

data.name: ClearSyncDataOptionDescriptionText
data.value: Pull data from your store’s cloud to refresh data on this device.

data.name: PrimaryDocketDescriptionText
data.value: Specify task/s for this printer: Only print customer receipts, back office docket printer or use it for both?

data.name: NoOfCopiesLabelText
data.value: Number of copies to print for each sale

data.name: EnableAutoOpenCashDrawerOnlyCashSalesLabelText
data.value: Auto-open cash drawer on cash sales only

data.name: AllCloudReceiptDescriptionText
data.value: AllReceipt is a digital receipting solution. Allow your customer to claim and store their receipts on the cloud.

data.name: PaymentOptionDescriptionLabelText
data.value: Cash, external non-integrated & custom payment types

data.name: IntegratedPaymentOptionDescriptionLinkButtonText
data.value: Click here for help with integrated payment hardware compatibility and setup.

data.name: Vantiv_Device_ISNot_Connected_Message
data.value: Your Vantiv device is not connected.

data.name: VantivConfigurationMessage
data.value: Please configure Vantiv and try again!

data.name: AssemblyPayment_Device_ISNot_Connected_Message
data.value: Your Westpac Group Payment device is not connected.

data.name: AssemblyPayment_Device_IS_Connected_Message
data.value: Your Westpac Group Payment device is connected.

data.name: AssemblyPaymentConfigurationMessage
data.value: Please configure Simple Payments Integration and try again!

data.name: ActivePrinterDescriptionLabelText
data.value: Bluetooth printers already paired with your device will appear in the list. For WiFi/network printer, Please ensure that it is connected to the same network as your iPad.

data.name: ActivePrinterDescriptionLinkButtonText
data.value: View Hike iPad app compatible printers.

data.name: CustomerDocketDescriptionLabelText
data.value: Do you require customers to wait while their orders are being prepared? Active this to print a queue docket/token number for your customers to know their place in the queue.

data.name: CustomerAppDescriptionLabelText
data.value: Hike Customer Display will let you activate a mirror display screen for customers. This will also allow you to run customer facing marketing campaigns on checkout. For this, first activate the option here and then download "Hike Customer Display" app on the customer facing secondary iPad and then follow the prompts.

data.name: UserRepeatNewPassword_EmptyMessage
data.value: Please enter your repeat new password

data.name: UserPassword_InValidMessage
data.value: Password must contain at least 1 number and minimum 6 characters.

data.name: NewPasswordAndRepeatDidntMatchValidationMessage
data.value: New password and repeat didnt match.

data.name: ProductIsCurrentlyLockedMessage
data.value: This product is currently locked for stock take (inventory count). It will be available again for sales once the stock take is complete.

data.name: SignupAndAgreementText1
data.value: By signing up you agree to Hike's

data.name: ThisSaleAlreadyRefunded
data.value: This sale is already fully refunded.

data.name: NoFoundSales
data.value: Sorry, we did not find sale in local.

data.name: SellLaybyAlertBody
data.value: Sale will be saved as a layby order with outstanding amount of

data.name: SellAccountAlertBody
data.value: Sale will be finalised with outstanding amount of {0} allocated to the customer account?

data.name: ParkedAlertBody
data.value: Click 'Save' to temporarily park this sale.

data.name: ExistingBusinessNewToCloudPOSSoftware
data.value: Existing business, new to cloud POS software

data.name: HikePartnerSettingItUpForClient
data.value: Hike partner, setting it up for client

data.name: CustomerEmailAlreadyExist
data.value: Email already exist, please try with other option

data.name: CustomerNotFound
data.value: Sorry, we did not find customer.

data.name: ArePartialApprovalsAllowedLabel
data.value: Do you want to allow Partial approvals?

data.name: AreDuplicateTransactionsAllowedLabel
data.value: Do you want to allow Duplicate transactions?

data.name: IsCashbackAllowedLabel
data.value: Do you want to allow Cashback?

data.name: IsDebitAllowedLabel
data.value: Do you want to allow Debit?

data.name: IsEmvAllowedLabel
data.value: Do you want to accept Emv Cards?

data.name: IsAllowPrintOnEFTPOSLabel
data.value: Do you want to print merchant and customer receipt on EFTPOS?

data.name: POSummaryText
data.value: There are {0} items in this backorder with {1} primary supplier/s. So, Hike can create {2} purchase orders for you as below:

data.name: StockOfflineText
data.value: You're currently offline. Please connect to internet to view current stock at other location.

data.name: PrintValidation
data.value: You can't print while processing sale

data.name: MintResetPinSuccessMessage
data.value: PIN is reset! Please check your email

data.name: ReopenInvoiceAlertMessage
data.value: Please open register to reopen invoice.

data.name: RefundInvoiceAlertMessage
data.value: Please open register to refund invoice.

data.name: RemoveCustomerText
data.value: Click yes to remove customer from this sale

data.name: RemovePaymentInCheckOut
data.value: Click 'yes' to permanently delete this payment

data.name: YouCanNotPayWithLessThanBackOrderDeposite
data.value: You can not pay with less than back order deposite

data.name: BackorderDepositeshouldnotbemorethatbackorderoutstanding
data.value: Backorder deposite should not be more than backorder outstanding

data.name: YouDoNotHaveEnoughPermissionToBackorder
data.value: You do not have enough permission to create backorder.

data.name: YouCanNotCreateBackOrderInExchangeOrRefund
data.value: You can not create back order in exchange or refund.

data.name: NoOutletAssigned
data.value: Your user has no outlet access. Please ask your admin to assign at least one outlet to you.

data.name: SquareWarningTitle
data.value: Payment request is sent to the terminal but it has timed-out due to no response from the payment terminal within the specified duration. Please click on 'Retry' to check the payment status.

data.name: SquareOrderAlreadyProcessed
data.value: Payment process for this transaction is already complete and cannot be cancelled. If customer has decided to cancel the purchase, please perform refund transaction

data.name: SquareCancelMessage
data.value: The transaction was either cancelled or timed out on Square terminal. If you believe it is because of connectivity problems and the order is in fact paid, please click on 'Ignore & mark order as paid'. Alternatively, please click on 'Cancel the order'

data.name: SquareTransactionIdNotAssociated
data.value: There is no Square transaction ID associated with this sale. Please refund the payment in Square

data.name: DeliveryAddressAlertMessage
data.value: Would you like to collect/select delivery address for this sale?

data.name: CloseRegisterAlertTitle
data.value: {0} has been open for more than 24 hours ({1} day/s)

data.name: CloseRegisterAlertMessage
data.value: {0} was {1} and is open since. Ignore this message if you'd like to keep it open, otherwise 'Go to Cash Register' to close and re-open. We recommend closing cash registers on a daily basis for enhanced reporting.

data.name: MultipleOfferSelectText
data.value: Multiple offers available for this item: Please select one

data.name: StoreFeatureNotAvailable
data.value: Your plan doesn't support this feature. To start using this feature, update to the Plus plan.

data.name: RegisterCloserModifiedText
data.value: Currently, the register closer is modified in the cloud. Please sync data from the setting page to get the latest update.

data.name: ScanQtyMoreThanQty
data.value: You've picked/issued more quantity for this item than ordered

data.name: NotEnoughQuantity
data.value: Not enough quantity at source outlet

data.name: ExportLogDescriptionText
data.value: Send device log to hike support team

data.name: ShareLogDescriptionText
data.value: Share invoice log files to other app

data.name: AccessCameraMsg
data.value: Go to app settings and change your camera permissions.

data.name: YouDoNotHaveSufficientPermissionToOpenRegister
data.value: You do not have sufficient permission to open register

data.name: ThisGiftCardWillExpireOn
data.value: This gift card will expire on

data.name: SerialNumberIsNotValid
data.value: This serial number is not valid

data.name: ItemWithOccupideTableMsg
data.value: The selected table is already assigned to another sale. Please choose an available table.

data.name: ItemWithOutOccupideTableMsg
data.value: The cart already contains items. Would you like to assign them to this table?
